activeProposals.title: [Temp Check] Protocol Fee Expansion: Robinhood Chain

recentDiscussion: [Temp Check] Protocol Fee Expansion: Robinhood Chain (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/temp-check-protocol-fee-expansion-robinhood-chain/26168)

Foundation inspection request — Cantina bounty mediation policy enforcement (finding #784, 29-day stalled dispute) (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/foundation-inspection-request-cantina-bounty-mediation-policy-enforcement-finding-784-29-day-stalled-dispute/26160)

headline.en: UNI's 10% weekly bounce is governance-hope froth stacked on unchanged net-inflationary math — fade it.
headline.zh: UNI 一周 +10% 的反弹是治理预期堆出来的泡沫,底层净通胀结构未变 — 做空反弹。

keyChanges.en: Two fee-switch-relevant proposals now active simultaneously: Robinhood Chain fee expansion temp check and v4 protocol fee activation — first real shot at expanding the $6.67M annual buyback denominator.
keyChanges.zh: 两项与 fee-switch 直接相关的提案同时进入活跃状态:Robinhood Chain 费用扩张 temp check 与 v4 协议费用激活 — 首次有机会实质性扩大 $6.67M 的年度 buyback 分母。

keyChanges.en: Price +10.41% over 7d while funding sits at 0.00%, OI only $18.59M, and 24h volume $5.45M — the bounce has no derivatives conviction, it's spot-driven and thin.
keyChanges.zh: 7 日 +10.41%,但 funding rate 为 0.00%,OI 仅 $18.59M,24h 成交量 $5.45M — 反弹完全没有衍生品信念支撑,是稀薄的现货推动。

keyChanges.en: Net inflation still +1.82%/yr: $6.67M buyback burns 1.84M UNI against 20M emitted; annualized revenue of $39.21M is nowhere near the ~$65M needed to flip burn > emission at $3.617.
keyChanges.zh: 净通胀仍为 +1.82%/年:$6.67M 回购销毁 1.84M UNI,对应 20M 年发行;年化收入 $39.21M 距离在 $3.617 让销毁量超过发行量所需的约 $65M 还差得远。

contrarianObservation.en: If Robinhood Chain fee expansion AND v4 fee activation both pass onchain within the next quarter, the revenue base could plausibly 2-3x from $39M, flipping net emission negative and forcing a mechanical re-rate toward the $5.96 DAO anchor — that's a legitimate asymmetric long a smart desk could be building here, precisely because funding is flat and no one is positioned for it.
contrarianObservation.zh: 如果 Robinhood Chain 费用扩张与 v4 费用激活两项均在下个季度内链上通过,收入基数可能从 $39M 放大 2-3 倍,让净发行翻负,并机械性地把估值拉回 $5.96 的 DAO 锚点 — 这是一笔真实存在的非对称多头机会,聪明资金完全可能正在此位建仓,正因为 funding 平淡、无人为此定价。

watchNext.en: Snapshot outcome and vote weight distribution on the Robinhood Chain fee expansion temp check — whales voting yes is the real signal, not the pass/fail.
watchNext.zh: Robinhood Chain 费用扩张 temp check 的 Snapshot 结果与投票权重分布 — 大户投赞成才是真信号,通过与否是其次。

watchNext.en: v4 protocol fees temp check progression and any foundation offchain signaling on timeline to onchain execution.
watchNext.zh: v4 协议费用 temp check 的推进节奏,以及基金会关于链上执行时间表的任何链下表态。

watchNext.en: Weekly protocol revenue run-rate — need sustained >$1.25M/day (~$65M annualized) to make burn > emission at current price.
watchNext.zh: 每周协议收入运行率 — 需持续 >$1.25M/日(年化约 $65M),才能在当前价格让销毁量超过发行量。

fullReasoning.en: UNI trades at $3.617, 39% below the DAO's own $5.96 treasury burn implied valuation and firmly inside the retail capitulation band. The 7d +10.41% bounce lines up neatly with two governance items that touch fee-switch math directly: the Robinhood Chain fee expansion temp check and v4 protocol fee activation. That's the story driving spot. Derivatives don't buy it — funding at 0.00%, OI only $18.59M, and 24h volume just $5.45M means this is a thin, spot-led drift, not accumulation. The structural problem is untouched: $39.21M annualized revenue produces a $6.67M buyback that burns 1.84M UNI against 20M emitted, leaving net inflation at +1.82%. Bullish narrative, dilutive reality. Historically temp checks convert to onchain execution maybe 40-50% of the time, and v4 fees on the existing revenue base don't flip the equation alone — you need Robinhood Chain volume too. Over 1-4 weeks the trade is fading pops into $3.80-4.00 with a stop above $4.30, then reassessing on hard Snapshot passage of either proposal. Don't chase; the burn math anchors this asset until governance genuinely moves the numerator.
fullReasoning.zh: UNI 现价 $3.617,较 DAO 自身国库销毁隐含估值 $5.96 低约 39%,处于散户投降区间。过去 7 天 +10.41% 的反弹时点上恰逢两项直接影响 fee-switch 机制的治理提案:Robinhood Chain 费用扩张 temp check 与 v4 协议费用激活。这就是驱动现货的叙事。但衍生品并不买账 — funding rate 为 0.00%,OI 仅 $18.59M,24h 成交量 $5.45M — 这是稀薄的现货漂移,不是建仓。结构性问题没有任何改变:年化协议收入 $39.21M,对应 $6.67M 的 buyback,年销毁 1.84M UNI,而年发行 20M,净通胀仍为 +1.82%。叙事利多撞上稀释现实。历史上 temp check 走到链上执行的转化率约 40-50%,且 v4 费用在现有收入基础上单独也不足以扭转公式 — 还需要 Robinhood Chain 的成交量。1-4 周方向:在 $3.80-4.00 区间做空反弹,止损 $4.30 上方,任一提案 Snapshot 硬通过再重新评估。不追高;在治理真正撬动收入分子之前,销毁公式会持续压制估值。
